Delosperma articulatum, also known as the annual ice plant, is a small, succulent shrub native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, and is said to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Delosperma articulatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
